title: lycianthes neglecta
intro: Lycianthes neglecta, also known as the "Purple Flowering Nightshade" or "Purple Flowering Lycianthes," is a flowering shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lycianthes neglecta include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Lycianthes neglecta is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
